{{Infobox technique
| name = Yerin's Blood Shadow
| introduced = cradle-04-skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Yerin]] possesses a [[Blood Shadow]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c15">''Skysworn'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin's Blood Shadow]] is a crimson shade in her general shape that extends from her spirit.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c8">''Underlord'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin's Blood Shadow]] uses a [[Goldsign]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c11">''Underlord'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin's Blood Shadow]] has Goldsigns and can laugh.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c21">''Underlord'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
